summary: Comprehensive testing of Lead Follow-up Management System. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All core flows working - Doctors/Medicals/Agencies follow-up modals open and submit correctly, Reminders page shows overdue tab with count badge and follow-up action buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/followups correctly creates follow-ups and auto-closes previous open ones
GET /api/followups/{entity_type}/{entity_id} returns history sorted newest first
GET /api/reminders/today includes is_overdue flag and lead_status for auto-generated follow-up reminders
Follow-up modal on Doctors page has all required elements: notes input, date input, status selector, history section
Follow-up modal on Medicals and Agencies pages works identically to Doctors
Reminders page has Today's Reminders, Overdue, and All Reminders tabs with count badges
Overdue tab shows follow-up items with OVERDUE badge, entity info, priority, and PhoneCall action button
Follow-up from Reminders opens modal with Previous Follow-ups history section
data-testid attributes correctly implemented: followup-notes-input, followup-date-input, followup-submit-btn, followup-btn-{id}, reminder-followup-{id}

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All follow-up modals and Reminders page features working

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test follow-ups during backend and frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Follow-up Management System fully tested. Follow-up APIs: POST /api/followups (creates follow-up, auto-closes previous), GET /api/followups/{entity_type}/{entity_id} (history). Reminders page at /admin/reminders has 3 tabs: Today's Reminders, Overdue, All Reminders. Overdue items have PhoneCall icon button (data-testid='reminder-followup-{id}') to open follow-up modal. Follow-up modal has notes, status selector, date/time inputs, and history section.

tests: Create follow-up for doctor - validates response structure
Returns history for doctor sorted newest first
Returns empty list for non-existent entity
Returns proper structure with reminders and total_count

verified: Follow-up button (PhoneCall icon) visible in actions
Click opens modal with correct doctor name
Modal has: notes input, date input, status selector, time input
History shows previous follow-ups with status badges
Submit creates follow-up and closes modal
Today's Reminders tab with count badge
Overdue tab with count badge (4 overdue items shown)
Overdue items show OVERDUE badge in red
PhoneCall action button on overdue follow-up items
Click action button opens follow-up modal
Modal shows entity type, lead status, Previous Follow-ups section

screenshots.doctors_followup_modal: Shows modal with notes, status (Customer), date input, and Follow-up History with 2 closed entries
screenshots.reminders_overdue: Shows 4 overdue items with OVERDUE badges, due dates, entity names, lead status badges, priority indicators, phone numbers
screenshots.reminder_followup_modal: Shows follow-up modal for Dr.HHH with Type: doctor, Status: Pipeline, notes area, Previous Follow-ups section
